name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 04 Jul 2019
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version","bold":true},{"text":": 6.59"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Minor Features","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Sales order sticky notes referring to invalid addresses will no longer appear when address validation is off."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Added a panel to the purchase order receive page with information on how to scan products to receive orderlines."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where unregistered users would see errors on the login page due to excessive login attempts when the username and password fields were blank."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed a bug where stock adjustments exported to Xero had different amounts due to rounding issues."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Corrected a problem where the age receivables report intermittently failed to load."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed a bug when calculating surcharges on orders to take into account tax free orderlines correctly."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
